prompts.title: Factory health check
prompts.body:
WORK: Film factory foundation audit

Read: archive/attachments/2026-06-16/CINEMATIC_FACTORY_BIG_PICTURE_ROADMAP_AND_PROMPTS_LOCKED_v1.md §3–§6

Run and report PASS/FAIL:
- bash scripts/validate-commercial-film-routing-v1.sh
- bash scripts/validate-commercial-film-sync-v1.sh
- bash scripts/validate-commercial-film-render-rules-v1.sh
- bash scripts/validate-commercial-film-ship-gate-v1.sh
- bash scripts/validate-n8n-film-factory-wire-v1.sh
- python3 scripts/commercial_film_critic_circle_v1.py --json --lane all

Quote factory_now_line. State freeze flag. List top 3 blockers to L40.
Do not publish. Do not outbound. STOP after report.

prompts.title: Ship gate dry run SourceA
prompts.body:
WORK: SourceA ship gate dry run

Run: python3 scripts/commercial_film_ship_gate_v1.py --lane sourcea --json --skip-ingest --no-deploy

Read receipt: ~/.sina/enforcement/commercial-film-ship-gate-receipt-v1.json

Report: publish_allowed · steps · next_action. STOP.

prompts.title: n8n film wire smoke
prompts.body:
WORK: n8n film wire smoke

Run film_status + film_critic via n8n_integration_core and n8n_glue_runner_v1.py film-status.

Report PASS/FAIL. STOP.

prompts.title: SourceA ingest + ship after master
prompts.body:
WORK: SourceA STYLE-A3 ingest + ship gate

Precondition: ~/Desktop/SourceA-Commercial-Master.mov exists.

Read: archive/attachments/2026-06-15/STYLE_A3_SOURCEA_SHOT_MATCH_BRIEF_2026-06-15_v1.md

Run ingest → bash sourcea-commercial-film-ship.sh

Critic vs STYLE-A3 + A5. Report verdict. STOP.

prompts.title: WitnessBC ingest + ship after master
prompts.body:
WORK: WitnessBC STYLE-B1 ingest + ship gate

Precondition: ~/Desktop/WitnessBC-Commercial-Master.mov exists.

Read: archive/attachments/2026-06-16/STYLE_B1_WITNESSBC_SHOT_MATCH_BRIEF_LOCKED_v1.md

Ingest → bash witnessbc-commercial-film-ship.sh. Report. STOP.

prompts.title: Learning circle memory rows
prompts.body:
WORK: Film memory learn rows from critic BLOCK

Read critic receipt. Append incidents jsonl per BLOCK with reference_pick, steal, fix, lane. STOP.

prompts.title: Multi-format derivatives
prompts.body: WORK: Phase 2 multi-format from PASS masters. 9:16 social cut. No re-record. STOP.

prompts.title: Validator chain sweep
prompts.body: WORK: Film factory validator green chain. Fix validator-scope failures only. STOP.

prompts.title: Reference SSOT sync
prompts.body: WORK: Reference SSOT consistency across reference-board, routing, locked master. Report drift. STOP.

prompts.title: Queue next after L40
prompts.body: WORK: Queue next film steps after first PASS. Read receipts. Route to PROMPT-006 or PROMPT-007. STOP.

founder_prompts.title: Record SourceA STYLE-A3
founder_prompts.body: Record Screen Studio per STYLE_A3 brief → ~/Desktop/SourceA-Commercial-Master.mov → Worker PROMPT-004

founder_prompts.title: Record WitnessBC STYLE-B1
founder_prompts.body: Record Screen Studio per STYLE_B1 brief → ~/Desktop/WitnessBC-Commercial-Master.mov → Worker PROMPT-005
